ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the player */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player (e.g., Pitcher, Outfielder) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team to which the player belongs */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "batting_hand" TEXT /* Batting hand of the player (e.g., Right, Left) */,
  "throwing_hand" TEXT /* Throwing hand of the player (e.g., Right, Left) */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in inches */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "country_of_birth" TEXT /* Country of birth of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League to which the team belongs */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division of the league (e.g., East, West) */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the stadium where the team plays */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the stadium */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_league FOREIGN KEY ("league") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league (e.g., MLB, NPB) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the league is based */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistics record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player to whom the statistics belong */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for the statistics */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played by the player in that year */,
  "runs" INTEGER /* Total runs scored by the player */,
  "hits" INTEGER /* Total hits made by the player */,
  "doubles" INTEGER /* Total doubles achieved by the player */,
  "triples" INTEGER /* Total triples achieved by the player */,
  "home_runs" INTEGER /* Total home runs hit by the player */,
  "total_bases" INTEGER /* Total bases gained by the player */,
  "rbis" INTEGER /* Total RBIs achieved by the player */,
  "stolen_bases" INTEGER /* Total stolen bases by the player */,
  "caught_stealing" INTEGER /* Total times caught stealing by the player */,
  "sac_hits" INTEGER /* Total sacrifice hits by the player */,
  "sac_flies" INTEGER /* Total sacrifice flies by the player */,
  "walks" INTEGER /* Total walks drawn by the player */,
  "hit_by_pitch" INTEGER /* Total times hit by pitch */,
  "strikeouts" INTEGER /* Total strikeouts by the player */,
  "grounded_into_double_play" INTEGER /* Total grounded into double plays by the player */,
  "avg" REAL /* Batting average of the player for that year */,
  "slg" REAL /* Slugging percentage of the player for that year */,
  "obp" REAL /* On-base percentage of the player for that year */,
  "ops" REAL /* On-base plus slugging of the player for that year */,
  "war" REAL /* Wins Above Replacement of the player for that year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who sustained the injury */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury sustained by the player */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the injury */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the injury */,
  "games_missed" INTEGER /* Number of games missed by the player due to the injury */,
  "injury_detail" TEXT /* Detailed description of the injury */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the coach */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the coach belongs to */,
  "coach_position" TEXT /* Position of the coach (e.g., Manager, Pitching Coach) */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of coaching experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player for whom the report is generated */,
  "report_year" INTEGER /* Year the report corresponds to */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data detailing the analytics findings */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., Batting, Pitching) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_reports_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_results" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "home_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "inning_count" INTEGER /* Number of innings played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of attendees at the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_results_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_results_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for account login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for account security */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, manager) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_accounts_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_player_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistics record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player to whom the statistics belong */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "at_bats" INTEGER /* Number of at-bats by the player in that game */,
  "runs" INTEGER /* Total runs scored by the player */,
  "hits" INTEGER /* Total hits made by the player */,
  "doubles" INTEGER /* Total doubles achieved by the player */,
  "triples" INTEGER /* Total triples achieved by the player */,
  "home_runs" INTEGER /* Total home runs hit by the player */,
  "total_bases" INTEGER /* Total bases gained by the player */,
  "rbis" INTEGER /* Total RBIs achieved by the player */,
  "stolen_bases" INTEGER /* Total stolen bases by the player */,
  "caught_stealing" INTEGER /* Total times caught stealing by the player */,
  "sac_hits" INTEGER /* Total sacrifice hits by the player */,
  "sac_flies" INTEGER /* Total sacrifice flies by the player */,
  "walks" INTEGER /* Total walks drawn by the player */,
  "hit_by_pitch" INTEGER /* Total times hit by pitch */,
  "strikeouts" INTEGER /* Total strikeouts by the player */,
  "avg" REAL /* Batting average of the player for that game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_player_statistics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES game_results ("game_id")
)
